ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the region */,
  "region_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the location belongs to */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the location */,
  "location_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., forest, town) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_data" (
  "location_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location data entry */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location the data belongs to */,
  "minimum_title" TEXT /* Minimum title required to hunt in the location */,
  "travel_requirements" TEXT /* Travel requirements to reach the location */,
  "minimum_gold" INTEGER /* Minimum gold required to hunt in the location */,
  "minimum_points" INTEGER /* Minimum points required to hunt in the location */,
  "minimum_cheese" INTEGER /* Minimum cheese required to hunt in the location */,
  "hunting_difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of hunting in the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_data_travel_requirements FOREIGN KEY ("travel_requirements") REFERENCES travel_requirements ("travel_requirement_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_data_minimum_title FOREIGN KEY ("minimum_title") REFERENCES titles ("title_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "titles" (
  "title_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each title */,
  "title_name" TEXT /* Name of the title */,
  "title_requirements" TEXT /* Requirements to achieve the title */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "travel_requirements" (
  "travel_requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each travel requirement */,
  "travel_requirement_name" TEXT /* Name of the travel requirement */,
  "requirement_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the travel requirement */,
  "requirement_type" TEXT /* Type of requirement (e.g., item, quest) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("travel_requirement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "penalties" (
  "penalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each penalty */,
  "penalty_name" TEXT /* Name of the penalty */,
  "penalty_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the penalty */,
  "penalty_effect" TEXT /* Effect of the penalty */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("penalty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_penalties" (
  "location_penalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location penalty entry */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location the penalty belongs to */,
  "penalty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the penalty */,
  "penalty_probability" TEXT /* Probability of the penalty occurring */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_penalty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_penalties_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_penalties_penalty_id FOREIGN KEY ("penalty_id") REFERENCES penalties ("penalty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "release_dates" (
  "release_date_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each release date entry */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location the release date belongs to */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the location */,
  "release_version" TEXT /* Version of the game when the location was released */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Notes or changes introduced with the release */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_date_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_release_dates_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, moderator, player) */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player progress entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the progress belongs to */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location the progress is for */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title achieved by the player */,
  "progress_date" TEXT /* Date when the progress was recorded */,
  "progress_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the player's progress */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_progress_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_progress_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gameplay_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gameplay metric entry */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location the metric belongs to */,
  "gold" INTEGER /* Gold earned in the location */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points earned in the location */,
  "cheese" INTEGER /* Cheese earned in the location */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric (e.g., player, system) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gameplay_metrics_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_metrics" (
  "location_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location metric entry */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location the metric belongs to */,
  "visits" INTEGER /* Number of visits to the location */,
  "hunts" INTEGER /* Number of hunts in the location */,
  "catches" INTEGER /* Number of catches in the location */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric (e.g., player, system) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_metrics_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)
